description_long: This is a modern commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily in light gray, accented by blue details on the tail, wingtips, and engine nacelles. The wings are swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, each supporting a single underwing engine. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all in blue. The airplane has a row of small, evenly spaced windows along the fuselage, indicating a multi-seat, enclosed cabin. The nose is rounded with a cockpit window, and the landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retracted or not modeled.
description: A sleek, light gray commercial airplane with blue accents, swept low-mounted wings, and underwing engines. It features a conventional tail and a row of passenger windows.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, blue wingtips, and the streamlined fuselage with blue tail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the row of windows, cockpit, swept wing, and blue tail fin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and both engines under the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the windows, cockpit, and blue tail, with the opposite wing visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and slight upward-angled wingtips; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral extremes.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turbofan underwing engines, one on each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable tricycle configuration based on typical design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and multiple cockpit windows.
